subject: Letzte Chance: Melde dich jetzt zum Webinar "Mobbing und Konflikte am Arbeitsplatz: Wie wehre ich mich?" an
html_body:
Jetzt anmelden

Hallo

Wirst du im Büro wie Luft behandelt? Oder nörgelt dein:e Chef:in ständig an deiner Arbeit herum? Fragst du dich, ob du vielleicht gemobbt wirst?

Katharina Siegrist, Anwältin und Rechtsexpertin beim Beobachter, dem renommierten Schweizer Magazin für Konsumenten und Arbeitnehmerschutz, weiss genau, wo ein normaler Konflikt endet und wo systematisches Mobbing beginnt. Im kostenlosen jobs.ch Live Webinar zeigt sie dir, wie Mobbing entsteht, wie du es erkennst und wie du dich dagegen wehren kannst.

Zudem bekommst du Einblicke in die häufigsten Konflikte am Arbeitsplatz, wie diese rechtlich einzuordnen sind und wie du damit umgehst.

Jetzt anmelden

🛡️ Rechtliche Möglichkeiten und wie du dich wehrst
 
Block 2: Weitere Konflikte

📄 Vertragsbrüche
🛡️ Deine rechtlichen Möglichkeiten

Stärke deine Position gegenüber deinem Arbeitgeber und lass dir nicht alles gefallen.

subject: Save 60% on Premium and spice up your profile, Carlos.
snippet: Here’s your chance to steal the limelight.    #outlookholder { width: 600px; } .qfbf { font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif !important; }        96 XING Premium  ( https://link.e-mail.xing.com/f/
html_body:
Here’s your chance to steal the limelight.

 
 
 
Save 60% on Premium and spice up your profile.
 
 
 
 
Hi Carlos,
 
 
Stand out from the crowd and show everyone what you're made of. Now’s a great time to polish your profile and showcase your strengths on XING.
 
 
Go Premium now to...
 
 
 
have your profile highlighted in search results
highlight your 3 top skills
add images and videos to your profile for greater personalisation
 
 
By opting for Premium you’ll also unlock a whole host of other features to professionalise your profile and steal the limelight.
 
 
What’s more, if you upgrade today, you’ll save 60% on the regular price*. Go Premium now to get the most out of your professional life.
 
 
Kind regards,
Your XING Team
 
 
Save 60% on Premium
 
 
 
Choose Premium:
 
See all visitors to your profile
Premium gives you exclusive insights about who visited your profile, opening the door to a whole host of important contact opportunities you don't want to miss out on.
 
More profile visibility
Your profile will deliver more detailed information when appearing in search results to attract more attention and more visitors.
 
Manage your contacts
Get your network in order and sort your contacts into the categories you want. This helps tremendously when your network is growing rapidly.
Save 60% now
 
 
*This offer is only available in the desktop version. Save 30% on the regular membership fee when subscribing for 3 months, and 60% on the regular membership fee when subscribing for 12 months. You pay for the entire membership term in advance. You can cancel your Premium membership, effective from the end of your current term. If you don't cancel, your subscription will renew automatically as a rolling monthly contract, billed one month in advance. Upon renewal, the regular Premium membership fee applies and you can cancel at any time, effective from the end of a given billing period. All prices include VAT. For customers based in third countries (under German VAT law ('Umsatzsteuergesetz'), third countries are all those regions not classified as part of the European Community (EC) in Section 1(2a) of this treaty) other than countries in which New Work SE is registered for VAT purposes, the prices quoted are net prices.
